description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: A Ranked Delegate’s allocated budget can be reduced if they do not fully comply with the participation requirements defined in this Article at [A.1.5.11 - Voting-Activity Metrics](f1fad141-fbcc-4f09-baa0-95875a26d4a3), [A.1.5.12 - Voting-Communication Metrics](fedf06e5-7657-4aaf-9a1d-d2e3b71de773), and [A.1.5.13 - Emergency Communications Requirement](a6bd8d88-4092-4547-86c9-fbda87aeacfd).
